description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a clean, rectangular design and a mix of white and light brown exterior walls. The front of the house includes a driveway with two parked cars and a covered entrance, while the rear opens to a spacious backyard with a patio, green lawn, and a pergola. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is enclosed by a low wall, and the backyard is equipped with outdoor seating and landscaping elements. The garage is integrated into the main structure, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional living spaces. The architectural style is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roof bungalow with a driveway, garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a patio and pergola. The exterior is white and light brown, with large, asymmetrical windows and a clean, rectangular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the backyard with a patio, pergola, and green lawn, as well as the driveway and garage with two cars.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, garage, main entrance, and the arrangement of windows on the facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garage, driveway, and the full length of the house, with the backyard visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard, patio, pergola, and outdoor seating area, with the house's rear windows and doors visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
